sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill states to use agent-browser for UI verification, but transcript shows no interactive checks were performed. Worker reported verification via typecheck/lint/build only.

summary: Import functionality for aresta.xlsx correctly implemented. handleImportBlok transforms Excel columns to database fields with proper type conversions. ExcelImportModal displays success message with importedCount. Type definitions updated across electron.d.ts, preload.ts, main.ts, and blokDatabase.ts. Build passes.
